LayoutMetadata.title: Refrio | Digital Presence Modernization Proposal | Por Erik H. A. Lima
LayoutMetadata.description: Hello world! This website is a project developed to upgrade the experience of users and potential customers when accessing the Refrio's portfolio. Created by Erik H. A. Lima - GitHub: https://github.com/erikhenriqueal/refrio-modernization-porposal

HomePage.slogan-subtitle: Providing smart solutions for the national cooling chain for decades.
HomePage.slider-home-01: Infrastructure for storing various types of products at any temperature
HomePage.slider-home-02: 100% mechanized line ensuring speed and safety in cargo handling
HomePage.slider-home-03: Over 800,000 m³ of spacious, reversible facilities

about.title: Who We Are?
about.description-01: Refrio is the ideal partner to support your warehousing, picking, and distribution logistics for various types of products.
about.description-02: With cutting-edge technology, we have equipment to handle and maintain foods within the strictest quality standards and at any temperature.
about.description-03: Our modern and efficient information systems enable the management of stored products.
about.description-04: With 40 years of experience in the market, we are a complete, agile, and modern company with operations throughout the country.

0.title: Tracking
0.description: Processes and systems, such as WMS, enable real-time inventory monitoring, including end-to-end shipment tracking.

1.title: Agile Processes
1.description: Efficient and accurate warehousing and distribution logistics solutions.

2.title: Container Loading
2.description: Load planning, weight distribution, balance calculations, and container and truck loading optimization.

3.title: Palletizing
3.description: Organizing goods on pallets to simplify storage and transportation.

4.title: Distribution
4.description: A nationwide distribution network with a fleet prepared to transport all types of cargo across Brazil.
4.highlight: Distribution that supports your business growth.

5.title: Inventory Management
5.description: Inventory is managed through integrated information systems and customized software solutions.

6.title: Freezing
6.description: Facilities include freezing tunnels capable of handling up to 200 tons of products simultaneously at subzero temperatures.

7.title: Unitization
7.description: Consolidation of cargo with different sizes and weights to maximize space utilization.

8.title: Promotional Kits
8.description: Packaging, repackaging, and promotional kit assembly services, including temperature-controlled operations.

9.title: Customer Service
9.description: Fast and effective solutions tailored to our customers' needs and inquiries.
